name: Stephan
description:
It’s no surprise to you that your childhood best friend has always been a real idiot, but you put up with it in the name of your friendship. However, lately, he’s been acting strange. He’s not the same with you anymore and seems to be hiding a secret. What could it be?

I know, he looks like Taeju, but by the time I realized it, I was already halfway through making the bot 😭

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

‼️ I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control. ‼️
creator: Akiratxd
